response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Lyrics match the provided reference text. 2. JSON Usage: Used fully for musical parts; manual transcription applied for speaking scenes (live talk and backstage phone call). 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps tightly synchronized with active vocal segments.

subtitles.original: あの黄昏も折り畳めば静寂
subtitles.english: If you fold up even that twilight, it's silence.

subtitles.original: 僕らの街じゃ暗がりは合図だ
subtitles.english: In our town, the darkness is a signal.

subtitles.original: 灯を消してはじめよう幕よ開け
subtitles.english: Turn off the lights, let's begin, let the curtain rise.

subtitles.original: 見上げ願いをあなたのように
subtitles.english: Look up and make a wish, just like you.

subtitles.original: 変わらず在っていたい
subtitles.english: I want to stay as I always have been.

subtitles.original: きらめきのヴェールを
subtitles.english: A veil of sparkling lights,

subtitles.original: 目元に箒星描いて
subtitles.english: drawing a comet near my eyes...

subtitles.original: 瞬いたソワレ今だ！
subtitles.english: The twinkling soirée, now is the time!

subtitles.original: 寝息を立てる太陽の目を盗んで
subtitles.english: Stealing a glance at the sleeping sun,

subtitles.original: 大脱走さ逃げ出そうぜ
subtitles.english: it's a great escape, let's run away.

subtitles.original: 朝未き空を跨ぐ栞を挟んだら
subtitles.english: If we insert a bookmark to cross the early morning sky,

subtitles.original: 行かなくちゃソワレ夜が明けるまでさ
subtitles.english: we have to go, soirée, until the night dawns.

subtitles.original: もうすこしこのままで
subtitles.english: Just a little longer, like this...

subtitles.original: あの鐘の音は茜差したって止まない
subtitles.english: That bell sound doesn't stop even if the twilight shines.

subtitles.original: 時間だ集まろう野望に喝采エールを
subtitles.english: It's time, let's gather, send cheers of applause to our ambition.

subtitles.original: 未来の話を寂しそうに聞いてる君に
subtitles.english: To you who listen to stories of the future with a lonely look,

subtitles.original: 誓うよ世界に魔法がなくたって
subtitles.english: I swear, even if there is no magic in this world,

subtitles.original: 夢は続いていく
subtitles.english: our dream will go on.

subtitles.original: おやすみに代わるよう
subtitles.english: To replace a "goodnight,"

subtitles.original: 鳴りやまないメロディー届けて
subtitles.english: deliver the melody that won't stop ringing.

subtitles.original: 見逃すなソワレ僕らは目撃者だ
subtitles.english: Don't miss it, soirée, we are the witnesses.

subtitles.original: 蒼穹に手を伸ばした
subtitles.english: We reached our hands out to the blue sky.

subtitles.original: 水平線がうたた寝したって
subtitles.english: Even if the horizon takes a nap,

subtitles.original: とどめなく日々を繋ぐ架け橋渡ったら
subtitles.english: once we cross the bridge that endlessly connects the days,

subtitles.original: いつの日かソワレ君に届くまでさ
subtitles.english: someday, soirée, until it reaches you,

subtitles.original: 何度でも呼び声を
subtitles.english: call out my voice, any number of times.

subtitles.original: 【star tail】
subtitles.english: [star tail]

subtitles.original: 消えない軌跡辿って
subtitles.english: Following the unending trajectory...

subtitles.original: 【star tale】
subtitles.english: [star tale]

subtitles.original: 幾星霜の果てへどこまでも
subtitles.english: To the end of many years, anywhere.

subtitles.original: 一晩じゃ語り尽くせない悲劇も
subtitles.english: Even a tragedy that can't be fully told in one night,

subtitles.original: 一晩中語り明かせたら喜劇になってゆく
subtitles.english: if we can talk all through the night, it will become a comedy.

subtitles.original: 【star tail】 聞かせてよ
subtitles.english: [star tail] Let me hear it.

subtitles.original: 【star tail】 一筋の
subtitles.english: [star tail] A single streak of...

subtitles.original: 【star tale】
subtitles.english: [star tale]

subtitles.original: 瞬いたソワレ今だ！
subtitles.english: The twinkling soirée, now is the time!

subtitles.original: 寝息を立てる太陽の目を盗んで
subtitles.english: Stealing a glance at the sleeping sun,

subtitles.original: 大脱走さ逃げ出そうぜ
subtitles.english: it's a great escape, let's run away.

subtitles.original: 朝未き空を跨ぐ栞を挟んだら
subtitles.english: If we insert a bookmark to cross the early morning sky,

subtitles.original: 約束だソワレ僕が眠るまでは
subtitles.english: it's a promise, soirée, until I fall asleep.

subtitles.original: 何度でもまた明日
subtitles.english: I'll see you again tomorrow, any number of times.

subtitles.original: 拝啓、ソワレ 君へ詠み継がれる
subtitles.english: Dear, soirée, passed on to you...

subtitles.original: 僕たちの物語
subtitles.english: is our story.

subtitles.original: ありがとうございました！
subtitles.english: Thank you very much!

subtitles.original: 以上、星街すいせいでした！
subtitles.english: That's all from Hoshimachi Suisei! Thank you!

subtitles.original: 本日のカット以上です！お疲れ様でした！
subtitles.english: That's all for today's cut! Great job, everyone!

subtitles.original: お疲れ様でした！ / お疲れ様です！
subtitles.english: Great job, everyone! / Great job!

subtitles.original: 足元お気をつけください
subtitles.english: Please watch your step.

subtitles.original: 暗くなってます お気をつけください
subtitles.english: It's gotten dark, please watch your step.

subtitles.original: お疲れ様でした！
subtitles.english: Great job, everyone!

subtitles.original: お疲れ様でした！
subtitles.english: Great job!

subtitles.original: お疲れ様です。配信見てくれてますか？
subtitles.english: Great job. Are you watching the stream?

subtitles.original: もちろん。本当に、お疲れ様です。
subtitles.english: Of course. Seriously, great job.

subtitles.original: このあと、あの件発表してきます。
subtitles.english: After this, I'll go announce *that* matter.

subtitles.original: 胸を張って、自信を持ってお話ししてきてください。
subtitles.english: Please speak with your head held high and with confidence.

subtitles.original: はい、頑張ります！
subtitles.english: Yes, I'll do my best!
